div.t-attf-class: alert alert-{{notification['type']}} alert-dismissible fade show shadow-sm mb-4

div.small:
Reference:
— Your profile is now up to date.

Reference:
— HR will notify you once reviewed.

div.class: alert alert-info alert-dismissible fade show mb-3
div.t: Note: The values shown below are from your rejected submission. Your actual employee record has not been changed. Please correct and resubmit.
Note: The values shown below are from your pending submission currently awaiting HR review.

t.div: Editing Locked: You have a profile update currently pending HR review. Editing is disabled until HR approves or rejects your request.

div.label: Work Phone
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

div.label: Personal Phone
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

div.label: WhatsApp
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

div.label: Emirates ID
div.small: Enter your unique 15-digit UAE Emirates ID number

t.t-value: int(portal_overlay.get('private_country_id') or 0) if portal_overlay.get('private_country_id') else (employee.private_country_id.id if employee.private_country_id else 0)

div.label: State

t.t-value: int(portal_overlay.get('private_state_id') or 0) if portal_overlay.get('private_state_id') else (employee.private_state_id.id if employee.private_state_id else 0)
int(portal_overlay.get('private_country_id') or 0) if portal_overlay.get('private_country_id') else (employee.private_country_id.id if employee.private_country_id else 0)

div.small: Select Country first to load states

div.label: State
div.small: Select Country first to load states

div.label: Nominee Contact Number
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

div.label: Reference Mobile
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if (portal_overlay.get('phone_code_1') or employee.phone_code_1 or '') == isd[0] else None

div.label: Emergency Contact Phone
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

div.label: Contact Person Phone
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

div.label: Alternate Mobile Number
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

div.label: Contact Person Phone (1)
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

div.label: Second Alternative Number
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

div.label: Home Land Line Number
div.small: Digits only, optional leading + for country code

option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if str(employee.year_of_passing or '') == str(yr) else None

div.label: Employee Disclaimer – I, hereby confirm that the information updated by me is accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge. I agree to keep my data updated at all times and consent to the collection and use of such information, for employment administration and legal compliances. I acknowledge that any false or incomplete information may lead to actions in accordance with company policies and applicable laws.
